title: plumeria venosa
intro: Plumeria venosa, also known as the variegated frangipani, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, characterized by its attractive white and green variegated leaves and fragrant, funnel-shaped flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Plumeria venosa include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Plumeria venosa include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
